hi guys! I have been feeling a lot better now! don't worry, its all being sorted out (I finally had the guts to actually tell my friends and family). I'm not going to therapy or on any type of med, as I already said it just comes and goes sometimes for short periods or long periods (this one was long) and I kinda just have to cope.

and thank god it FINALLY passed because I was feeling so good I actually finished the pfp for the bot and posted it (the nice messages and art really helped me too)!

And because of me feeling a lot better, I am going to finishing the pfp of the other bots I've just had rotting in private lol. anyways, enjoy the bot or something yk yea.
